contracts.DomainError.__init__: (self, code: str, message: str, entity_id: str | None = None) -> None
contracts.resolve_catalog_snapshot: (definition_refs: list[DefinitionRef], element_definitions: list[ElementDefinition], connection_definitions: list[ConnectionTypeDefinition]) -> CatalogSnapshot
contracts.list_available_definitions: (object_id: str, diagram_id: str, include_drafts: bool, element_definitions: list[ElementDefinition], connection_definitions: list[ConnectionTypeDefinition]) -> CatalogSnapshot
contracts.create_element_definition_draft: (draft: CreateElementDefinitionDraft, actor: ActorRef, created_at: datetime, definition_id: str, version: int = 1) -> ElementDefinition
contracts.create_connection_definition_draft: (draft: CreateConnectionDefinitionDraft, actor: ActorRef, created_at: datetime, definition_id: str, version: int = 1) -> ConnectionTypeDefinition
contracts.transition_definition_status: (definition: CatalogDefinition, target_status: DefinitionStatus, actor: ActorRef, allow_global_activation: bool) -> CatalogDefinition
contracts.validate_working_diagram: (elements: list[DiagramElement], connections: list[DiagramConnection], catalog: CatalogSnapshot, stage: ValidationStage) -> ValidationReport
contracts.validate_layout: (layout: DiagramLayout, element_ids: set[str], connection_ids: set[str], max_route_points_per_connection: int) -> ValidationReport
contracts.create_diagram: (diagram_id: str, object_id: str, name: str, system_kinds: set[DiagramSystemKind], actor: ActorRef, created_at: datetime) -> Diagram
contracts.change_diagram_status: (diagram: Diagram, target_status: DiagramStatus, updated_at: datetime) -> Diagram
contracts.apply_authoring_command: (base_revision: DiagramRevision | None, command: AuthoringCommand, catalog: CatalogSnapshot, validation_stage: ValidationStage = ValidationStage.DRAFT) -> WorkingDiagramResult
contracts.apply_authoring_commands: (base_revision: DiagramRevision | None, commands: list[AuthoringCommand], catalog: CatalogSnapshot, validation_stage: ValidationStage = ValidationStage.DRAFT) -> WorkingDiagramResult
contracts.commit_revision: (diagram: Diagram, expected_current_revision: int, working: WorkingDiagramResult, actor: ActorRef, change_source: ChangeSource, created_at: datetime, schema_version: int, change_summary: str | None, diagram_repository: DiagramRepository, revision_repository: RevisionRepository, unit_of_work: UnitOfWork) -> CommitRevisionResult
contracts.assemble_estimation_package: (package_id: str, diagram: Diagram, revision: DiagramRevision, collector_rule_version: str, status: EstimationPackageStatus, element_items: list[ElementEstimationItem], connection_items: list[ConnectionEstimationItem], requirements: RequirementAnalysis, generated_at: datetime) -> EstimationDataPackage
contracts.build_estimation_data: (diagram: Diagram, revision: DiagramRevision, catalog: CatalogSnapshot, collector_rule_version: str, package_id: str, generated_at: datetime) -> EstimationDataPackage
contracts.create_diagram_use_case: (object_id: str, name: str, system_kinds: set[DiagramSystemKind], actor: ActorRef, diagram_id: str, now: datetime, diagram_repository: DiagramRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer, object_gateway: ObjectGateway | None) -> Diagram
contracts.get_diagram_workspace: (diagram_id: str, actor: ActorRef, diagram_repository: DiagramRepository, revision_repository: RevisionRepository, catalog_repository: CatalogRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer) -> DiagramWorkspace
contracts.apply_diagram_commands_use_case: (diagram_id: str, base_revision: int, commands: list[AuthoringCommand], actor: ActorRef, revision_repository: RevisionRepository, catalog_repository: CatalogRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer) -> WorkingDiagramResult
contracts.commit_diagram_revision_use_case: (diagram_id: str, expected_current_revision: int, working: WorkingDiagramResult, actor: ActorRef, change_source: ChangeSource, change_summary: str | None, now: datetime, schema_version: int, diagram_repository: DiagramRepository, revision_repository: RevisionRepository, catalog_repository: CatalogRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer, unit_of_work: UnitOfWork, object_gateway: ObjectGateway) -> CommitRevisionResult
contracts.list_available_definitions_use_case: (object_id: str, diagram_id: str, include_drafts: bool, actor: ActorRef, catalog_repository: CatalogRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer) -> CatalogSnapshot
contracts.create_element_definition_draft_use_case: (draft: CreateElementDefinitionDraft, actor: ActorRef, definition_id: str, now: datetime, catalog_repository: CatalogRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer) -> ElementDefinition
contracts.create_connection_definition_draft_use_c: (draft: CreateConnectionDefinitionDraft, actor: ActorRef, definition_id: str, now: datetime, catalog_repository: CatalogRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer) -> ConnectionTypeDefinition
contracts.transition_definition_status_use_case: (definition_ref: DefinitionRef, definition_kind: Literal['element', 'connection'], target_status: DefinitionStatus, actor: ActorRef, allow_global_activation: bool, catalog_repository: CatalogRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer) -> CatalogDefinition
contracts.build_diagram_estimation_data: (diagram_id: str, revision: int | None, actor: ActorRef, collector_rule_version: str, package_id: str, now: datetime, diagram_repository: DiagramRepository, revision_repository: RevisionRepository, catalog_repository: CatalogRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer) -> EstimationDataPackage
contracts.inspect_estimation_source: (diagram_id: str, revision: int, entity_type: SourceEntityType, entity_id: str, actor: ActorRef, revision_repository: RevisionRepository, catalog_repository: CatalogRepository, authorizer: CapabilityAuthorizer) -> EstimationSourceEntity
contracts.DiagramRepository.list_by_object_id: (self, object_id: str, cursor: str | None, page_size: int) -> DiagramSummaryPage
contracts.RevisionRepository.get: (self, diagram_id: str, revision: int) -> DiagramRevision | None
contracts.RevisionRepository.list: (self, diagram_id: str, cursor: str | None, page_size: int) -> DiagramRevisionSummaryPage
contracts.CatalogRepository.list_visible_definitio: (self, object_id: str, diagram_id: str, include_drafts: bool) -> CatalogSnapshot
contracts.UnitOfWork.__exit__: (self, exc_type: object, exc: BaseException | None, tb: object) -> bool | None
contracts.CapabilityAuthorizer.require_capability: (self, actor: ActorRef, capability: str, resource_id: str | None) -> None
contracts.SqlAlchemyUnitOfWork.__exit__: (self, exc_type: object, exc: BaseException | None, tb: object) -> bool | None

notes: DomainError.__init__: [FIELD_ASSIGNMENT] MUST assign code, message, and entity_id to stable public attributes
DomainError.__init__: [SCHEMA_CONSTRAINT] MUST reject a blank code or blank message
DomainError.__init__: [FORBIDDEN_ACTION] MUST NOT derive machine-readable code from exception text
resolve_catalog_snapshot: [VALIDATION_ERROR] MUST raise IntegrityError when any exact DefinitionRef cannot be resolved
resolve_catalog_snapshot: [DETERMINISM_OR_ORDERING] MUST return definitions sorted by definition id and version
resolve_catalog_snapshot: [BEHAVIOR] MUST return each requested definition exactly once, resolved at its exact requested version
list_available_definitions: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST enforce status and scope visibility and MUST NOT leak diagram-scoped or object-scoped definitions
list_available_definitions: [RULE_REFERENCE] MUST apply definition status and scope visibility using = rules.definition_scope_policy
list_available_definitions: [DETERMINISM_OR_ORDERING] MUST return stable code, id and version ordering
list_available_definitions: [BEHAVIOR] MUST include a draft definition only when include_drafts is true and the supplied object and diagram context permits its scope
create_element_definition_draft: [FIELD_ASSIGNMENT] MUST set status to draft and assign actor provenance, created_at, definition_id, and version
create_element_definition_draft: [VALIDATION_ERROR] MUST reject invalid scope_ref combinations and duplicate port codes, property codes, or estimation refs
create_element_definition_draft: [ORCHESTRATION] MUST validate draft.visual.svg_markup through _validate_element_visual_asset before constructing ElementDefinition
create_element_definition_draft: [FORBIDDEN_ACTION] MUST NOT activate the definition or overwrite an existing version
create_element_definition_draft: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST project code, name, category, scope, ports, properties, estimation refs and visual from the draft DTO unchanged into the created definition
create_connection_definition_draft: [FIELD_ASSIGNMENT] MUST set status to draft and assign actor provenance, created_at, definition_id, and version
create_connection_definition_draft: [VALIDATION_ERROR] MUST reject invalid scope_ref combinations and duplicate property codes or estimation refs

create_connection_definition_draft: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST project code, name, category, medium, scope, properties, estimation refs and visual from the draft DTO unchanged into the created definition
transition_definition_status: [RULE_REFERENCE] MUST enforce = rules.definition_status_transitions and return a new immutable definition
transition_definition_status: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST reject global activation unless allow_global_activation is true
transition_definition_status: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST preserve definition identity, version, creator and creation time and change only the status field
_validate_element_visual_asset: [BEHAVIOR] MUST return the original SVG markup unchanged only after the complete visual-asset policy passes
_validate_element_visual_asset: [VALIDATION_ERROR] MUST reject markup containing scripts, event handlers, external references, or foreignObject
_validate_element_visual_asset: [CONFIG_REFERENCE] MUST enforce the size limit from = config.catalog.max_svg_markup_bytes
_validate_element_visual_asset: [FORBIDDEN_ACTION] MUST NOT derive ports, properties, or any engineering semantics from the markup
validate_working_diagram: [RETURN_SHAPE] MUST return stable ValidationIssue records for missing references, undeclared properties, incompatible connections and stage-specific requirements
validate_working_diagram: [DETERMINISM_OR_ORDERING] MUST sort issues by severity, entity type, entity id, property code and code
validate_working_diagram: [BEHAVIOR] MUST validate all elements before connections so connection findings can rely on a complete element index
validate_layout: [RETURN_SHAPE] MUST report unknown element references, unknown connection references, duplicate entries, invalid viewport, and route-point limit violations as blocking issues
validate_layout: [CONFIG_REFERENCE] MUST enforce the route-point limit from = config.layout.max_route_points_per_connection
validate_layout: [FORBIDDEN_ACTION] MUST NOT create, remove or redefine engineering entities from layout data
validate_layout: [BEHAVIOR] MUST compare every layout reference against the supplied element_ids and connection_ids sets
normalize_layout: [DETERMINISM_OR_ORDERING] MUST normalize rotations to 0, 90, 180, or 270 and preserve stable element and connection ordering
normalize_layout: [FORBIDDEN_ACTION] MUST NOT add or delete engineering entities and MUST NOT change route_points membership
normalize_layout: [BEHAVIOR] MUST return a layout containing exactly the input elements and connections with only rotation and presentation values normalized
create_diagram: [FIELD_ASSIGNMENT] MUST create status draft, current_revision 0 and equal created_at and updated_at values
create_diagram: [VALIDATION_ERROR] MUST reject an empty system_kinds set
create_diagram: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST project object_id, name and system_kinds unchanged from the arguments into the created Diagram
change_diagram_status: [RULE_REFERENCE] MUST enforce = rules.diagram_status_transitions
change_diagram_status: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST preserve identity and creation fields and change only status and updated_at
apply_authoring_command: [ORCHESTRATION] MUST dispatch by the AuthoringCommand discriminator and return a complete WorkingDiagramResult
apply_authoring_command: [BEHAVIOR] MUST produce a working state that reflects exactly the supplied command applied to the base revision content
apply_authoring_commands: [BEHAVIOR] MUST apply the command list atomically in memory and MUST return no partial result after structural failure
apply_authoring_commands: [DETERMINISM_OR_ORDERING] MUST preserve command order and deterministic entity ordering
commit_revision: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST compare expected_current_revision and raise ConflictError on mismatch
commit_revision: [ORCHESTRATION] MUST append the immutable revision and advance Diagram.current_revision in one UnitOfWork transaction
commit_revision: [FORBIDDEN_ACTION] MUST NOT call Registry, MCP, LLM or other external services while the transaction is open
commit_revision: [BEHAVIOR] MUST allocate revision number expected_current_revision + 1 and return the updated diagram together with the appended revision
collect_element_items: [DETERMINISM_OR_ORDERING] MUST group only equal definition versions and estimator-relevant properties, sum quantities, preserve source ids and sort output
collect_element_items: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST project name from the pinned definition version and assign unit_code using the count unit from = rules.estimation_collection_policy
collect_connection_items: [FORBIDDEN_ACTION] MUST NOT derive physical length from presentation layout
collect_connection_items: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST project name from the pinned connection type definition version
collect_connection_items: [DETERMINISM_OR_ORDERING] MUST preserve source ids and stable grouping order
analyze_estimation_requirements: [RETURN_SHAPE] MUST return specific deduplicated missing requirements and warnings and MUST NOT invent suggested values
analyze_estimation_requirements: [BEHAVIOR] MUST derive each missing requirement from a required_for_estimation property or enabled measurement method lacking a validated value
assemble_estimation_package: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST project object_id, diagram_id, revision, schema_version, warnings, requirements and source provenance
build_estimation_data: [ORCHESTRATION] MUST use the shared validation, element collection, connection collection, requirement analysis and assembly operations
build_estimation_data: [RETURN_SHAPE] MUST return an EstimationDataPackage whose element_items, connection_items, missing_requirements and warnings come only from those shared operations
build_estimation_data: [BEHAVIOR] MUST add an explicit warning naming every draft definition that contributed items
build_estimation_data: [FORBIDDEN_ACTION] MUST NOT calculate prices, select retailer products, create estimate positions or invent missing engineering values
create_diagram_use_case: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST authorize diagram.author before persistence
create_diagram_use_case: [ORCHESTRATION] MUST verify the Registry project exists and is not archived when = config.database.object_verification_enabled is true
create_diagram_use_case: [BEHAVIOR] MUST create the diagram through create_diagram and persist it via DiagramRepository.save before returning it
get_diagram_workspace: [RETURN_SHAPE] MUST return domain models and MUST NOT return React Flow Node or Edge objects
get_diagram_workspace: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST assemble DiagramWorkspace from the stored diagram, its current committed revision and the catalog snapshot pinned by that revision
apply_diagram_commands_use_case: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST require diagram.author
apply_diagram_commands_use_case: [DEPENDENCY_BOUNDARY] MUST load the requested base revision and visible catalog then call apply_authoring_commands
apply_diagram_commands_use_case: [BEHAVIOR] MUST return the WorkingDiagramResult produced by apply_authoring_commands unmodified
commit_diagram_revision_use_case: [ORCHESTRATION] MUST run commit-stage validation before calling commit_revision
commit_diagram_revision_use_case: [ORCHESTRATION] MUST call ObjectGateway.publish_diagram_index after the commit transaction succeeds
commit_diagram_revision_use_case: [FALLBACK] MUST log a failed index publication and return the successful commit result unchanged
commit_diagram_revision_use_case: [BEHAVIOR] MUST commit through commit_revision and return its CommitRevisionResult unchanged
list_available_definitions_use_case: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST require catalog.read
list_available_definitions_use_case: [ORCHESTRATION] MUST delegate visibility filtering to list_available_definitions and add no separate filtering logic
list_available_definitions_use_case: [BEHAVIOR] MUST return the CatalogSnapshot produced by list_available_definitions for the requested visibility context
create_element_definition_draft_use_case: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST require catalog.draft.create
create_element_definition_draft_use_case: [BEHAVIOR] MUST create the draft through create_element_definition_draft and persist it via CatalogRepository.save_element_definition
create_connection_definition_draft_use_case: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST require catalog.draft.create
create_connection_definition_draft_use_case: [BEHAVIOR] MUST create the draft through create_connection_definition_draft and persist it via CatalogRepository.save_connection_definition
transition_definition_status_use_case: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST require catalog.activate.local for local activation and catalog.activate.global for global activation
transition_definition_status_use_case: [BEHAVIOR] MUST load the exact definition version, apply transition_definition_status and persist the returned definition
build_diagram_estimation_data: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST authorize estimation.read
build_diagram_estimation_data: [DETERMINISM_OR_ORDERING] MUST use the requested revision or the current committed revision and produce the same semantic package for the same inputs
build_diagram_estimation_data: [CONFIG_REFERENCE] MUST report the collector rule version from = config.estimation.collector_rule_version inside the package
build_diagram_estimation_data: [BEHAVIOR] MUST build the package through build_estimation_data from the loaded revision and its exactly pinned catalog definitions
inspect_estimation_source: [SECURITY_BOUNDARY] MUST require estimation.read
inspect_estimation_source: [RETURN_SHAPE] MUST return only the requested source entity or its exact pinned definition and raise NotFoundError otherwise
inspect_estimation_source: [BEHAVIOR] MUST locate the entity by entity_type and entity_id inside the requested committed revision or its pinned catalog definitions
ObjectGateway.get_object_snapshot: [RETURN_SHAPE] MUST project only object_id and status from the Registry ProjectRecord
ObjectGateway.publish_diagram_index: [FORBIDDEN_ACTION] MUST NOT be called while a UnitOfWork transaction is open
create_engine_from_settings: [CONFIG_REFERENCE] MUST create a PostgreSQL SQLAlchemy 2.x engine from DatabaseSettings values sourced from = config.database and MUST NOT embed credentials
create_engine_from_settings: [BEHAVIOR] MUST apply pool size, overflow, pool timeout, statement timeout and connect timeout from DatabaseSettings to the created engine
create_session_factory: [BEHAVIOR] MUST create sessions with explicit transaction ownership and no silent autocommit
serialize_diagram_revision: [SCHEMA_CONSTRAINT] MUST use canonical Pydantic JSON-compatible serialization for PostgreSQL JSONB
serialize_diagram_revision: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST project every DiagramRevision field into the payload through model_dump and omit nothing
deserialize_diagram_revision: [VALIDATION_ERROR] MUST validate payload as DiagramRevision and raise PersistenceError on invalid stored data
deserialize_diagram_revision: [BEHAVIOR] MUST reconstruct a DiagramRevision equal to the one serialized by serialize_diagram_revision for round-trip payloads
serialize_element_definition: [SCHEMA_CONSTRAINT] MUST serialize the complete validated ElementDefinition in canonical JSON-compatible mode without ORM-only fields
serialize_element_definition: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST project every ElementDefinition field including the visual asset into the payload and omit nothing
deserialize_element_definition: [VALIDATION_ERROR] MUST validate payload as ElementDefinition and raise PersistenceError on invalid stored data
deserialize_element_definition: [BEHAVIOR] MUST reconstruct an ElementDefinition equal to the one serialized by serialize_element_definition for round-trip payloads
serialize_connection_definition: [SCHEMA_CONSTRAINT] MUST serialize the complete validated ConnectionTypeDefinition in canonical JSON-compatible mode without ORM-only fields
serialize_connection_definition: [FIELD_PROJECTION] MUST project every ConnectionTypeDefinition field including the visual asset into the payload and omit nothing
deserialize_connection_definition: [VALIDATION_ERROR] MUST validate payload as ConnectionTypeDefinition and raise PersistenceError on invalid stored data
deserialize_connection_definition: [BEHAVIOR] MUST reconstruct a ConnectionTypeDefinition equal to the one serialized by serialize_connection_definition for round-trip payloads
SqlAlchemyDiagramRepository.__init__: [DEPENDENCY_BOUNDARY] MUST accept an existing Session and MUST NOT create its own engine or session
SqlAlchemyCatalogRepository.__init__: [DEPENDENCY_BOUNDARY] MUST accept an existing Session and MUST NOT create its own engine or session
SqlAlchemyRevisionRepository.append: [BEHAVIOR] MUST insert an immutable revision row and never update existing revision rows
SqlAlchemyRevisionRepository.append: [VALIDATION_ERROR] MUST surface duplicate primary key insertion as ConflictError or PersistenceError with a stable code
SqlAlchemyUnitOfWork.__exit__: [FALLBACK] MUST rollback on exceptions and close owned transaction resources

stdlib: from typing import Annotated, Literal, Protocol
third_party: from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field, field_validator, model_validator
